rationale: The citing paper is explicitly framed as an extension of the cited paper: its note states it “extends Anderson et al. (2015)” by moving from individual harbinger customers to zip-code harbingers and testing portability across contexts. Its research gap also directly depends on the cited study (“prior work established harbinger customers mainly within one retailer context”), indicating foundational and substantive use rather than a passing mention. The DOI match (10.1509/jmr.13.0415) confirms this is the specific referenced work.
